title: Velvety Crunchy Middle Eastern Tofu Stir-fry
description: This meal-prep-friendly dish features a blend of oyster sauce and plant-based elements to create a velvety texture with a crunchy middle, perfect for adding variety to your diet.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes and press them to remove excess water.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat, add sesame oil, and sauté garlic until fragrant but not browned.
Add chopped onions and red bell peppers to the wok/pan, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are translucent.
Increase the heat to high, add the pressed tofu cubes, tossing them in the oil mixture thoroughly. Cook for about 5 minutes or until golden brown on all sides.
Reduce heat slightly and pour oyster sauce over the dish, stirring well to incorporate with the tofu.
Squeeze lemon juice over the stir-fry just before serving to add a pop of brightness.
Add finely chopped fresh parsley towards the end of cooking for added freshness and color.
